destinations.name: Cape Town
destinations.summary: Discover why Cape Town is the world's top destination. From Table Mountain hikes to Cape Winelands tours, plan your perfect South African escape with Safari.com.

destinations.name: Ngorongoro Crater
destinations.summary:
The Ngorongoro Crater is one of the highlights of safaris in Tanzania.
This unique setting arises from an ancient volcanic caldera.
It's openness gives rise to an extraordinary abundance of animals that visitors can see - it's quite common to see the Big 5 in a single day.

destinations.name: Okavango Delta
destinations.summary:
The Okavango is a lush habitat where animals abound.
If you know much about Southern African safaris, you'll know the climates are generally dry and water holes are often where guides will take travellers to try and spot wildlife.
In the Okavango, the entire area is a wetland and it makes for abundant wildlife sightings with unique activities like canoeing, boat trips and game drivers.

destinations.name: Serengeti National Park
destinations.summary:
The Serengeti National Park is one of Tanzania's best kept treasures.
The sough after destination has visitors coming to see the famous Wildebeest migration.
It can work as a singular destination or part of a larger itinerary incorporating nearby areas like the Ngorongoro Crater.

brands.name: Jao Collection
brands.summary: The Jao Collection is the independent home of the six camps in the Okavango Delta’s Jao Reserve (NG25), an exclusive private concession held by the Kays family. Jao, Kwetsani, Jacana, Tubu Tree, Little Tubu and Pelo span water and dry-land Delta, from architectural flagship luxury to intimate back-to-nature camps.

brands.name: Lalibela Wildlife Reserve
brands.summary: Step into the heart of a pristine wildlife reserve, where sweeping landscapes and extraordinary wildlife greet you at every turn. Embark on authentic open-vehicle safaris for an intimate, immersive connection with nature, then return to the serene luxury of our accommodations, where comfort and tranquility await.

brands.name: Machaba Safaris
brands.summary: Family-run since 2012, Machaba Safaris operates a tight portfolio of owner-led camps across Botswana, spanning the Okavango, Khwai and Chobe. Classic safari styling, conservation-first thinking, and a culture of hands-on hosting that's hard to fake at scale.

experiences.name: Child-friendly safaris
experiences.summary: The lodges our safari specialists trust with young children, whether you want them looked after while you take a breather, or joining every game drive.

experiences.name: Sleep-out safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured sleep-out programme. Curated by our specialists from properties offering genuine overnight experiences under the stars.

experiences.name: Horseback safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured horseback programme. Curated by our specialists from properties offering genuine riding among wildlife.

experiences.name: Luxury Rail Journeys
experiences.summary: Incorporating a great train journey into your travel itinerary adds a unique perspective to your vacation. With some of the best-escorted rail tours in the world, traveling by train in Southern Africa has become a firm favorite in recent years. Rail passage to game reserves, through Winelands, to historic sites and across the wide-open countryside of the Karoo region, creates an extraordinary travel experience.

experiences.name: Hot Air Ballooning Tours & Safaris
experiences.summary: Floating above it all in a hot-air balloon gives you the best take on the expanse of wildlife areas in Southern & East Africa. What amazes most first-time balloonists is the absolute stillness: the silence as you float above the scenic plains, desert dunes, forests, and rivers in Africa. Even if you’ve flown elsewhere, this is a unique experience. Balloon flights last an hour or so, drifting wherever the air currents take you, and with ample opportunities for photography and video filming. In the time-honored tradition of balloon flights the world over, you toast your return to earth with a champagne breakfast. Most Balloon Safaris end with some leisurely game viewing on the way back to your lodge or camp. With our in-depth knowledge and first-hand experience of Southern and East Africa, we’re able to custom-make a safari, with all the added adventures and activities, to suit your individual preferences and budget. Let's start planning!

experiences.name: Photographic Safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured photographic programme. Curated by our specialists from properties built for serious wildlife photography.

experiences.name: Walking Safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured walking programme. Curated by our specialists from properties that have built the discipline into the safari, not added it as an afterthought.

experiences.name: Bush & Beach Safaris
experiences.summary: The most associated environment for wildlife is African savanna. However a few locations are unique in that the environment is near the ocean, presenting a unique opportunity to experience "bush and beach" safaris.

experiences.name: Family Safaris
experiences.summary: The lodges our safari specialists pick for families travelling together. Family suites, interleading rooms and exclusive-use villas, with the space for several generations under one roof.

experiences.name: Honeymoon Safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured honeymoon programme. Curated by our specialists from properties that genuinely cater to couples celebrating a wedding.

experiences.name: Luxury Safaris
experiences.summary: Africa's top-tier safari lodges and itineraries. Curated by our specialists alongside the editors who set the international benchmark for the category: Condé Nast Traveler, Travel + Leisure, AFAR, Forbes and Robb Report.

experiences.name: Gorilla & Chimp Trekking
experiences.summary:
Another truly unique experience in Africa is the ability to get up close and personal with natures largest living primates - the Gorillas of Uganda and Rwanda. Professional guides take you into the forests and ensure protocols for safety without compromising the raw energy and thrill of the experience.
Below are some of the packaged safaris and lodges that allow you to take part in this riveting phenomonen.

experiences.name: Great Migration
experiences.summary:
The Great Migration is an ecological marvel. Each year, nearly 2 million animals - predominantly zebra, wildebeest and gazelle - move between the Serengeti in Tanzania, and the Masai Mara in Kenya.
The picture is reminiscent of a scene from the Jungle Book. Open plains filled with vast number of animals in every direction.

experiences.name: Big 5 Safaris
experiences.summary: The most common reason anyone comes on a real African Safari, is to see the Big 5 - Elephants, Lion, Leopard, Rhino and African Buffalo. They are the "Coca Cola" of safari wildlife. Seeing them in their natural habitat - as opposed to a theme park or a zoo - is what makes safaris in Africa so special. While fairly common throughout parks and game reserves in Africa, there are certain regions where they abound, and below are some of the places one is almost guaranteed to see all 5, perhaps even in a day!

experiences.name: Travel specials
experiences.summary: We pride ourselves in being in touch with the market. There are a lot of specials out there and we capture the majority on the site. They come in the form of straight discounts, stayX/payY or even based on short notice bookings. On this page we've curated only the very best!

safaris.name: 3 Day Victoria Falls Fly-in Safari
safaris.summary: Waterfalls, Wildlife & River Sunsets: Discover the magic of Victoria Falls on this unforgettable 3-day safari. Fly from Johannesburg to one of Africa’s most iconic destinations, where you’ll explore the falls on a guided tour, enjoy a Zambezi River sunset cruise, and stay at the award-winning Victoria Falls Safari Lodge. Ideal for nature lovers and adventure seekers alike.
highlights: 2 nights at the award-winning Victoria Falls Safari Lodge
Guided walking tour through the rainforest at Victoria Falls
Sunset cruise on the Zambezi with drinks and snacks
Dinner at the Boma Drum Show and Vulture Culture lunch
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and airport transfers included

safaris.name: 8-Day Victoria Falls and Mauritius Combo
safaris.summary: Embark on a thrilling 8-day journey, beginning with an unforgettable stay at one of Southern Africa’s premier safari lodges, Victoria Falls Safari Club. Enjoy breathtaking views of the untouched bushveld, where a central waterhole attracts a variety of wildlife. Journey onwards and enjoy a stopover in Johannesburg for your flight to paradise. Your adventure continues along the Eastern African coast with a luxurious 4-night beach safari in Trou Aux Biches, Mauritius. Relish in world-class cuisine and 5-star service.
highlights: 2 nights at Victoria Falls Safari Lodge overlooking a busy waterhole
Guided tour of Victoria Falls and sunset cruise on the Zambezi
Overnight at Southern Sun OR Tambo between flights
4 nights at 5-star Constance Sakoa Boutik in Trou Aux Biches
Beach days, spa treatments and island excursions in Mauritius
Return flights from Johannesburg to Victoria Falls and Mauritius included

safaris.name: 11-Day Southern Africa Safari in Style
safaris.summary: Experience the best of Southern Africa on this unforgettable 11-day journey through Cape Town, Kruger National Park, and Victoria Falls. Start in Cape Town, where you’ll explore iconic sights like Table Mountain and the V&A Waterfront. Then fly to Kruger for a classic Big Five safari at Hoyo Hoyo Safari Lodge, offering immersive game drives and traditional Tsonga-style luxury. Continue to Victoria Falls and stay at The Wallow Lodge, enjoying guided tours, river cruises, and authentic cultural encounters. With premium accommodations, scenic flights, and exceptional experiences, this trip offers the perfect blend of adventure, wildlife, and natural wonder.
highlights: 3 nights at The Cape Milner with Table Mountain and V&A Waterfront at hand
3 nights at Hoyo Hoyo Safari Lodge in a private Kruger concession
Twice-daily Big Five game drives with expert guides
3 nights at The Wallow Lodge on a private concession near Victoria Falls
Guided tour of the Falls, sundowner river cruise and cocktails at Batoka Gorge
All internal flights and transfers across Cape Town, Kruger and Victoria Falls

safaris.name: 7-Day Safari in Kapama Game Reserve and Victoria Falls
safaris.summary: Travel through the Greater Kruger National Park into the Kapama Game Reserve to stay at Kapama River Lodge in a suite with uninterrupted views of this game-rich, big 5, reserve. To the ultra-lux Victoria Falls Safari Club where the luxurious rooms have unspoilt views of the bushveld and spectacular sunsets.
highlights: 3 nights at Kapama River Lodge in the Greater Kruger
Twice-daily Big Five game drives and guided bush walks
3 nights at the ultra-luxe Victoria Falls Safari Club
Guided tour of Victoria Falls and a Zambezi sunset cruise
Cultural village visit with optional helicopter flight over the falls
Flights from Johannesburg to Hoedspruit and on to Victoria Falls

safaris.name: 8-Day Luxury Botswana to Hwange Safari
safaris.summary: Embark on a luxury safari through the Eden of Africa and embrace the tranquillity of Botswana at Ngoma Safari Lodge. Travel through to where the thunder roars of the stunning Victoria Falls at the Safari Lodge and a life-enriching safari experience at The Hide in the excellence and luxury of Hwange National Park.
highlights: 2 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge overlooking the Chobe floodplains
Morning game drive in Chobe and sunset cruise on the river
2 nights at Victoria Falls Safari Lodge with waterhole-facing room
Guided tour of Victoria Falls and dinner at The Boma drum show
3 nights at The Hide in Hwange with up to four activities daily
Optional sleep-out under the stars in the Dove's Nest treehouse

safaris.name: 4-Day-All-Inclusive Victoria Falls Safari at Elephant Camp
safaris.summary: The Elephant Camp is rated one of the top luxury lodges in Zimbabwe, being in close proximity to the Victoria Falls.
highlights: 3 nights at Elephant Camp inside Victoria Falls National Park
Suites with private plunge pools overlooking the Zambezi Gorges
Guided tour of Victoria Falls and the Canopy Tour
Game drives and walking trails tracking the Big Five
Sunset cruise on the Zambezi Royal Boat
Round-trip road transfers from Victoria Falls Airport included

safaris.name: 7-Day Safari Promotion: From Sabi Sands to Victoria Falls
safaris.summary: Big Five Safari & Victoria Falls Elegance: From the wild heart of Sabi Sands to the iconic thundering spray of Victoria Falls, this seamless journey offers an unforgettable blend of luxury, wildlife, and natural wonder.
highlights: 3 nights at Sabi Sabi Bush Lodge, then 3 at The Elephant Camp
Twice-daily open-vehicle game drives and a walking safari in Sabi Sand
Big Five tracking across the unfenced Sabi Sand and Kruger wilderness
Guided tour of Victoria Falls plus a Zambezi sunset cruise

All inter-camp flights from Johannesburg via Skukuza and Kruger included

safaris.name: 8-Day All-Inclusive Kruger to Mozambique Fly-In Safari
safaris.summary: Enjoy the adventure and excitement of a Big Five Kruger safari, rounded off with an idyllic, unspoilt Mozambican beach retreat. This is the best of both worlds’ experience on one holiday.

Twice-daily Big Five game drives plus guided bush walks
Snorkelling at Fingers Reef, kayaking, fishing and beach picnics
Oceanfront deluxe suite on Mozambique's unspoilt Indian Ocean coast
All flights between Johannesburg, Kruger and Vilanculos included
All meals and selected drinks at both lodges

safaris.name: 8-Day Cape Town Family Safari and Vic Falls Combo
safaris.summary: Experience the best of Southern Africa on this 8-day Cape Town family safari and Victoria Falls combo tour. Begin in vibrant Cape Town, exploring Table Mountain, the V&A Waterfront, and historic neighbourhoods. Then journey to Sanbona Wildlife Reserve for an unforgettable Big Five safari with luxury lodge accommodations and family-friendly game drives. Wrap up your adventure at Victoria Falls, one of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World, where you’ll enjoy guided tours, cultural visits, and sunset cocktails over Batoka Gorge. With seamless transfers, luxury stays, and unforgettable wildlife experiences, this curated itinerary is perfect for families seeking adventure and comfort.
highlights: 3 nights at the Victoria & Alfred Hotel on Cape Town's V&A Waterfront
Table Mountain cable car, Bo-Kaap and optional Robben Island visit
2 nights at Gondwana Family Lodge in Sanbona with twice-daily Big Five game drives
2 nights at The Wallow Lodge on a private concession inside Victoria Falls National Park
Guided tour of Victoria Falls and sundowners over Batoka Gorge
Internal flights Cape Town to Vic Falls to Johannesburg included

safaris.name: 4 Day Fly-in Masai Mara Safari
safaris.summary: The Masai Mara is well known for its year-round concentration of animals, big cat sightings and the Great Mammal Migration which occurs annually - a wildlife spectacle not to be missed!
highlights: 3 nights at &Beyond Kichwa Tembo Tented Camp in the Masai Mara
Dawn and dusk game drives tracking lion, cheetah, elephant and buffalo

safaris.name: 11 Day Luxury Kruger, Victoria Falls & Cape Town
safaris.summary: A very popular tour combination for travelers looking to truly experience Southern Africa is the Kruger National Park, Victoria Falls, and Cape Town. This tour is created on past client experiences but you are welcome to replace your accommodation to a level that suits your comfort preference and your wallet. Our travel experts will be happy to assist you with alternative options.

Table Mountain cable car, Cape Peninsula drive and Boulders Beach penguins
3 nights at Lion Sands River Lodge for Big Five game drives in Sabi Sand
3 nights at Sanctuary Sussi & Chuma on the Zambezi River
Guided tour of Victoria Falls plus sundowner cruises and canoeing
All internal flights between Cape Town, Kruger and Victoria Falls included

safaris.name: 8-Day Chobe to Sabi Sands: The Ultimate Wildlife Journey
safaris.summary: Discover the best of Southern Africa on this 8-day luxury safari combining Botswana’s Chobe National Park and South Africa’s iconic Sabi Sand Game Reserve. Begin with a stay at Muchenje Safari Lodge, known for its panoramic views and exclusive night drives in Chobe. Enjoy game drives, boat safaris, and cultural encounters before returning to Johannesburg for a restful overnight stay. Then journey to Inyati Safari Lodge in the heart of BIG 5 territory, where daily game drives and walking safaris offer unforgettable wildlife experiences.
highlights: 3 nights at Muchenje Safari Lodge on Chobe's quieter western edge
Chobe River cruise, cultural village visit and exclusive night drive
Overnight at African Rock Hotel near OR Tambo with complimentary massage
3 nights at Inyati Game Lodge in the Sabi Sand Game Reserve
Big Five game drives and walking safaris with rangers and Shangaan trackers

safaris.name: 7-Day Ultra-Lux Kruger and Vic Falls Fly-in Safari
safaris.summary: This meticulously planned safari transports guests into two stunning wilderness realms, featuring stays at prestigious luxury lodges and savoring African cuisine beneath the open sky. Begin your adventure in Kruger National Park at Lukimbi Safari Lodge, where you'll reside in a classic suite with superb game viewing opportunities from an expansive private deck. Then, journey to witness the majestic spray of Victoria Falls, staying in a deluxe room at the Palm River Hotel.

Twice-daily open-vehicle game drives and guided bush walks
Suite with private deck, indoor and outdoor showers overlooking the river
3 nights at the 5-star Palm River Hotel in Victoria Falls
3-course dinner at Cassia Restaurant, Ilala Lodge Hotel
All flights from Johannesburg to Kruger, on to Vic Falls and back

safaris.name: 15-Day Classic Southern Africa Experience — Cape Town, Kruger, Victoria Falls
highlights: 3 nights at the Victoria & Alfred Hotel exploring Cape Town and Table Mountain
Cape Point, Boulders Beach penguins and Cape Winelands tastings
2 nights at Tintswalo Atlantic in Hout Bay, then 2 at La Cotte Farm in Franschhoek
4 nights at Sabi Sabi Bush Lodge with twice-daily game drives and Big Five viewing
3 nights at Tintswalo Siankaba on the Zambezi with sunset cruises and a guided Victoria Falls tour

safaris.name: 4-day Chobe National Park safari
safaris.summary: Exclusive ALL-INCLUSIVE Luxury Experience - Promotion 33% off when booking between 15 November to 31 March, excluding 20 December to 10 January,
highlights: 3 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge, an 8-suite property overlooking the Chobe floodplain

Game-viewing by boat on the Chobe River alongside the area's vast elephant herds

safaris.name: 7-Day Victoria Falls and Chobe: Classic Railway Safari Adventure
safaris.summary: Embark on a luxurious, scenic journey aboard the Rovos Rail from Pretoria to Victoria Falls, where the elegance of train travel meets the beauty of Southern Africa. Once you arrive, indulge in an exciting 3-night stay at Ngoma Safari Lodge, where game drives — both on land and water — await. Savour exquisite cuisine crafted by the lodge’s talented chefs, who showcase the rich cultural flavours of Botswana, offering you an unforgettable culinary experience.
highlights: 3 nights aboard Rovos Rail in a Pullman Suite from Pretoria to Victoria Falls
Gourmet meals and all beverages included throughout the rail journey
3 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge overlooking Chobe National Park
Game drives among Chobe's renowned elephant herds
Boat safari on the Chobe River for hippo, croc and birdlife
All road transfers between Victoria Falls Station, Kasane Airport and the lodge

safaris.name: 7-Day Kruger Park and Vic Falls Combo
safaris.summary: Experience the ultimate safari adventure with a 7-day journey through Kruger National Park and Victoria Falls.
highlights: 3 nights aboard Kruger Shalati, the train on the bridge over the Sabie River
Twice-daily game drives in open Land Rovers across Kruger National Park
3 nights at The Wallow Lodge in Victoria Falls
Full-day Chobe National Park trip with river safari, lunch and game drive
Guided tour of Victoria Falls on the Zimbabwean side
All flights from Johannesburg and internal transfers included

safaris.name: 8-Day Luxe Getaway from Sabi Sabi to Mauritius
safaris.summary: A luxurious 7-day escape blending thrilling South African safaris at Sabi Sabi Earth Lodge with serene beachfront relaxation at Le Jadis Resort in Mauritius.
highlights: 4 nights at Sabi Sabi Earth Lodge in the Sabi Sand
Twice-daily open-vehicle game drives and walking safaris with expert trackers
Big Five viewing followed by spa treatments and private-deck plunge pools
3 nights at Le Jadis Beach Resort on Mauritius's northwest coast
Beachfront infinity pool, snorkelling, diving and four gourmet restaurants
All flights included: JNB to Sabi Sabi airstrip and onward to Mauritius

safaris.name: 4-Day Fly-In Victoria Falls Ultimate Adventure
safaris.summary: This 4-day safari showcases the breathtaking beauty of the Zambezi River, the majestic mist of Victoria Falls, and the wildlife-rich Chobe National Park. Guests will indulge in luxury at Batonka Guest Lodge while embarking on exciting adventures, including a sundowner cruise, helicopter rides, and a full-day trip to the Chobe in Botswana.
highlights: 3 nights at Batonka Guest Lodge in Victoria Falls
Sundowner cruise on the Zambezi aboard the Pure Signature Deck
Sunrise walking tour of Victoria Falls with a 25-30 minute helicopter flight
Full-day crossing into Botswana for a Chobe game drive and boat cruise
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and all transfers included

safaris.name: 5-Day All-inclusive Luxury Western Chobe Safari
highlights: 4 nights at Muchenje Safari Lodge in Western Chobe National Park
Twice-daily game drives plus night safaris with gourmet dinners
Full-day Sedudu boat cruise along the Chobe River
Sunrise guided walking safari and mokoro canoe excursion
Cultural visit to a local village and schools
All meals, drinks, park fees and Kasane Airport transfers included

safaris.name: 6 Day Romantic Chobe & Okavango Safari
safaris.summary: The private Ngoma Safari Lodge, is located on the edge of a plateau, offering endless views over the seasonal Chobe flood plain. Thereafter visit Little Machaba, an intimate oasis nestled in the riverine trees.
highlights: 2 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge overlooking the Chobe floodplains
Full-day Chobe safari with river cruise and picnic lunch
Night drives and walking safaris in the Chobe Forest Reserve
3 nights at Little Machaba, a four-tent camp in the Khwai Concession
Mokoro dugout canoe safari through the Okavango waterways
Scenic light-aircraft flights between Kasane, Khwai and Maun

safaris.name: 3 Day Chobe Fly-in Safari
safaris.summary: This outstanding three-day safari will give you the opportunity to gain an insight into the Chobe National Park which is renowned for having the largest herds of elephants in Africa, whilst still enjoying the classic luxury and comfort of the iconic Chobe Game Lodge.
highlights: 2 nights at Chobe Game Lodge, the only property inside Chobe National Park
Open-vehicle game drives along the Chobe Riverfront with expert guides
Sundowner cruise on the Chobe River past bathing elephants, hippos and crocodiles
Big Five viewing among Africa's largest elephant herds
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg to Kasane plus all transfers

safaris.name: 7 Day Chobe & Delta Fly-in Tour
safaris.summary: This fly-in safari tour starts in the elegant five-start, fully Ecotourisim-certified safari lodge, that is the only property that is located inside the world-renowned Chobe National Park. The Chobe Game Lodge is set on the banks of the famous Chobe River. After three days you will be transferred by charter plane to Camp Okavango, situated in the heart of the Okavango Delta on the island of Nxaragha. This island is surrounded by water all year round which offers an authentic Okavango Delta water wilderness experience.
highlights: 3 nights at Chobe Game Lodge, the only property inside Chobe National Park
Sundowner cruise on the Chobe River at the water's edge
Charter flight across the Delta to Camp Okavango on Nxaragha Island
3 nights at Camp Okavango surrounded by permanent Delta waterways
Mokoro and motorboat outings through the channels and lagoons
All meals, local drinks and charter flights from Maun included

safaris.name: 9 Day Bushveld And Beach Escape
safaris.summary: This 9-day tour is an exploration of one of Africa's most renowned safari destinations and a gorgeous tropical beach in Mozambique.
highlights: 3 nights at Mjejane River Lodge bordering Kruger National Park
Open-vehicle Big Five game drives in Kruger and Mjejane Game Reserve
Boma dinners under the stars overlooking the Crocodile River
5 nights at Machangulo Beach Lodge on Mozambique's tropical coast
Snorkelling, diving and optional day trips to Inhaca Island
Internal flights, road and scenic boat transfers all included

safaris.name: 9-Day Victoria Falls, Cape Town, MalaMala Camp Ultra-Luxury Safari
highlights: 2 nights at Victoria Falls Safari Club, 3 at Victoria & Alfred Hotel, 3 at MalaMala Camp
Guided tour of Victoria Falls and sunset cruise on the Zambezi
Private Cape Peninsula tour to Cape Point and Boulders Beach penguins
Full-day Winelands excursion through Stellenbosch and Franschhoek

safaris.name: 10-Day Best of East Africa Migration Safari
safaris.summary: Your adventure starts in Nairobi, showcasing modern Kenyan style, before heading to the Masai Mara to see the Big Five, Mara Cats, and the Great Migration (July-November). Stay at Kichwa Tembo Tented Camp for a classic safari experience. Next, travel to the Serengeti, spending two days at a mobile camp with prime views of the migration. Visit Ngorongoro Crater, a wildlife haven, and stay two nights at Melia Ngorongoro with stunning views. End your trip at Lake Manyara National Park, known for tree-climbing lions and flamingos, staying at the Lake Manyara Tree Lodge. A perfect mix of unique stays and incredible wildlife.
highlights: 2 nights at Karen Blixen Cottages with visits to David Sheldrick Trust and Giraffe Centre
2 nights at Kichwa Tembo in the Masai Mara for Big Five game drives
2 nights at Simbavati Grumeti Camp in the Serengeti with private guide
Full-day game drive in the Ngorongoro Crater, staying at Melia Ngorongoro
Tree-climbing lions and flamingos at Lake Manyara, overnight at andBeyond Tree Lodge
Stop at Olduvai Gorge en route between the Serengeti and Ngorongoro

safaris.name: 10-Day Exploring Victoria Falls, Hwange & Chobe National Park Safari
highlights: 3 nights at Victoria Falls Hotel, 3 at Camelthorn Lodge, 3 at Chobe Game Lodge
Guided tour of Victoria Falls and sundowner cruise on the Zambezi
12-minute helicopter flight over Victoria Falls
Game drives and nature walks in Hwange National Park

safaris.name: 11 Day Botswana Luxury Safari
safaris.summary: This incredible fly-in safari includes all the regions that Botswana is famous for, starting with elephants at the Chobe River, then moving down into lion territory in the Savute. Next is Moremi which has the best of both worlds - game drives and water mokoro experiences, giving you the opportunity to truly explore Botswana’s remote and pristine landscapes, in luxury!

Sundowner cruise on the Chobe River amongst its famous elephant herds

safaris.name: 11-Day Luxury Adventure Through South Africa to Mauritius

Twice-daily game drives plus a guided Big Game walking safari
1 night at Fairlawns Boutique Hotel in a Grand Chateau Suite
4 nights at The Oberoi Beach Resort on Mauritius's coast
Complimentary water sports including snorkelling, kayaking and windsurfing

safaris.name: 6-Day Grumeti Safari Promotion
safaris.summary:
Home of the Great Migration. Simbavati Grumeti is nestled on the open plains between the Serengeti National Park and the Grumeti River,
within Tanzania’s fabled northern safari circuit.
highlights: 5 nights at Simbavati Grumeti between the Serengeti and Grumeti River
Daily open-vehicle game drives across the acacia-dotted plains
Walking safari, night drive and full-day game drive included

Resident big cats and large plains-game herds year-round

safaris.name: 7-Day Fly-In Chobe and Okavango Delta Luxury Safari
safaris.summary: This 7-day fly-in safari offers an extraordinary adventure, whisking guests away to the stunning Chobe waterfront and the enchanting waterways of the Okavango Delta, immersing them in the heart of Africa's pristine wilderness and vibrant aquatic life.
highlights: 3 nights at Muchenje Safari Lodge on the Chobe waterfront
Full-day Chobe River boat cruise, night drives and seasonal walking safaris
Light-aircraft flight from Kasane to Jedibe Airstrip in the Okavango Delta
3 nights at Setari Camp, a water-only camp reached by boat
Mekoro excursions, boating and guided walks across Delta waterways

safaris.name: 9-Day Classic Botswana Safari
safaris.summary: A 9-day journey through Botswana’s most iconic wilderness regions, from the elephant-rich Chobe River to the untamed beauty of the Okavango Delta. Stay in luxury tented camps and lodges, combining classic safari charm with intimate, wildlife-filled experiences.
highlights: 2 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge overlooking the Chobe River
Game drives in Chobe National Park among vast elephant herds
2 nights at Machaba Camp on the Khwai River with mokoro excursions
2 nights at Gomoti Plains for wild dog, lion and cheetah sightings
2 nights at Kiri Camp with off-road and night drives in a private concession
Light-aircraft flights between Kasane, the Delta camps and Maun

safaris.name: 9-Day Desert and Delta Ultra-Lux Safari
highlights: 2 nights each at Camp Xakanaxa, Camp Okavango, Leroo La Tau and Chobe Game Lodge
Game drives and boat cruise in Moremi Game Reserve
Mokoro and motorboat safaris through the Okavango Delta

Half-day chimpanzee tracking in Kibale Forest National Park
Nature walk through community-run Bigodi Swamp
Gorilla trekking with endangered mountain gorillas in Bwindi
Scenic drive through the Albertine Rift with Rwenzori views
All transfers in a 4x4 Land Cruiser with English-speaking guide

safaris.name: 6-Day Ultra-Luxe Indian Ocean Getaway
safaris.summary: Welcome to your 6-Day Ultra-Luxe Getaway at Le Jadis Beach Resort & Wellness, Mauritius, where relaxation and adventure await. Enjoy a private transfer from the airport to your stunning Luxury Lagoona Suite with garden view. Spend your days lounging by crystal-clear waters, sipping cocktails, and exploring exciting activities like paddleboarding, kayaking, windsurfing, and snorkeling. In the evenings, dine at one of Le Jadis’ exquisite restaurants, offering a blend of island flavors and international cuisine. A true paradise escape awaits.
highlights: 5 nights at Le Jadis Beach Resort & Wellness in a Luxury Lagoona Suite
Daily breakfast at Sylea and dining across Oryza and Passion Creole
Couples' spa ritual with Hammam, sauna and beach yoga sessions
Snorkelling, kayaking, paddleboarding and a glass-bottom boat over the reef
Lantern-lit private beach dinner with live music
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and private airport transfers

safaris.name: 7 Day Classic Kenyan Safari
safaris.summary: Set off on a journey of a lifetime with an exclusive seven day Kenyan Safari Experience. You will be immersed in the breathtaking landscapes and thrilling wildlife encounters that Kenya has to offer.
highlights: 1 night at Severin Safari Camp in Tsavo West, exploring Mzima Springs
2 nights at Ol Tukai Lodge in Amboseli with elephant herds beneath Kilimanjaro
1 night at Naivasha Sopa Lodge with an optional boat trip on Lake Naivasha
2 nights at Tipilikwani Mara Camp on the banks of the Talek River
Full-day Masai Mara game drive with a picnic lunch by the Mara River
Private 4x4 Land Cruiser with English-speaking guide and Flying Doctors cover

safaris.name: 7-Day All-Inclusive Masai Mara to Zanzibar Safari
safaris.summary: This 7-day bush and beach safari delivers an unforgettable journey, blending the wild, open plains of the Masai Mara with the serene, turquoise waters of the Indian Ocean in Zanzibar. Guests will experience the freedom of the vast savannahs and the tranquil beauty of sandy beaches, creating a perfect contrast between adventure and relaxation.
highlights: 3 nights at Governors' Camp on the Masai Mara, then 3 at Nungwi Dreams in Zanzibar
Twice-daily game drives and guided bush walks in the Masai Mara
Big cat and plains game viewing from open Landcruisers
Swim with green turtles at a community conservation lagoon in Nungwi
Beach days on Zanzibar's northern tip with two infinity pools overlooking the Indian Ocean
All flights from Nairobi Wilson, including the charter to the Mara and onward to Zanzibar

safaris.name: 7-Day Botswana Safari: Linyanti Tented Suites & Khwai Exploration
safaris.summary: Discover Botswana’s raw beauty on this immersive safari adventure, combining remote wilderness, starlit sleep-outs, and iconic wildlife experiences.
highlights: 3 nights at Linyanti Bush Camp, then 3 at Khwai Lediba
Twice-daily game drives across two distinct Botswana wilderness areas
Mokoro safaris, guided bush walks and optional night drives
Optional ABCF community visit for cultural insight
Scheduled inter-camp flight between Linyanti and Khwai
All meals, beverages and airstrip transfers included

safaris.name: 7-Day Luxury Beach Safari from Mombasa to Zanzibar
highlights: 3 nights at Serena Beach Resort & Spa on the Mombasa coast
3 nights at Royal Zanzibar Beach Resort on white-sand beaches
Optional snorkelling, spa treatments and water sports at both resorts
Cultural visits to Mombasa's Old Town, Fort Jesus and Zanzibar's Stone Town
Direct flight from Mombasa to Zanzibar with private transfers throughout
All meals included, plus selected drinks in Zanzibar

safaris.name: 7-Day Luxury Zanzibar East Fly-In Beach Safari
safaris.summary: This 7-day immersive beach safari will take guests to the iconic beaches of the East. Experience luxury at LUX Marijani Beach Resort and TUI Blue Bahari Zanzibar Resort while embarking on exciting cultural day trips through the city, lush forests, and crystal blue ocean.
highlights: 3 nights at LUX Marijani Beach Resort, then 3 at TUI Blue Bahari Zanzibar
All-inclusive meals and selected drinks throughout both resorts
City, Spice and Prison Island tour through Stone Town
Full-day Safari Blue dhow trip with snorkelling and seafood barbecue
Round-trip flights from Nairobi to Zanzibar and all transfers included

safaris.name: 7-Day Ultra-lux fly-In safari Okavango Delta to Vic Falls
highlights: 3 nights at Karangoma Lodge in the Okavango Delta
Helicopter transfer from Vumbura Airstrip to the lodge
Mokoro safari through the Delta's waterways with a bush breakfast
3 nights at Camp Hwange with twice-daily game drives and walking safaris
Tracking Hwange's elephant herds with expert guides
Finish at Victoria Falls with an optional Zambezi sunset cruise

safaris.name: 8 Day Amboseli, Mount Kenya & Masai Mara Flying Safari
safaris.summary: This 8-day tour explores the capital city of Nairobi, the Amboseli National Park which offers spectacular views of Tanzania's Mt Kilimanjaro, and the Masai Mara National Park which is known for its annual Great Migration.
highlights: 1 night at Nairobi Tented Camp inside Nairobi National Park
2 nights at Porini Amboseli Camp with Kilimanjaro views and night game drives
2 nights at Porini Rhino Camp in Ol Pejeta, visiting the Chimpanzee Sanctuary and Baraka the Black Rhino
2 nights at Porini Lion Camp in the private Olare Motorogi Conservancy bordering the Masai Mara
Optional hot-air balloon flight over the Mara, with Great Migration viewing July to October
All internal flights between Wilson, Amboseli and Nanyuki airstrips included

safaris.name: 8-Day All-Inclusive Fly-In Samburu to Masai Mara Safari
safaris.summary: Experience the essence of Kenya's wilderness with the "Kenya Wings over the Wilderness Safari." Departing from Nairobi, this thoughtfully curated safari immerses you in the untouched beauty of Kenya's wild landscapes. From the rugged terrain of Samburu to the vast expanses of the Maasai Mara, each day unfolds a new adventure. Travel by scheduled light aircraft, allowing the sky to guide you as you explore nature's rhythm. This journey promises a safari and an unforgettable flight into the heart of Kenya's pristine beauty.
highlights: 4 nights at Soroi Larsens Camp in Samburu, then 3 at Soroi Luxury Migration Camp in the Mara
Twice-daily shared game drives in custom 4x4 vehicles
Track the Samburu Special 5: Grevy's zebra, gerenuk, Beisa oryx, Somali ostrich, reticulated giraffe
Sundowner on a raised viewing platform above the Koitogo Hills
Big Five game viewing on the Mara plains, with Great Migration potential July-October
Round-trip light-aircraft flights from Wilson Airport, all transfers included

safaris.name: 8-Day Azura Benguerra - 50% off for couples
safaris.summary: ALL-INCLUSIVE 5-star Luxury Experience on Benguerra Island, Bazaruto.
highlights: 7 nights in a beachfront villa with private plunge pool at Azura Benguerra
All meals, drinks and daily sunset cocktail at your private sala
Sunset dhow cruise, kayaking, paddleboarding and a Land Rover island drive
Snorkelling, scuba diving and dolphin and dugong sightings in Bazaruto National Park
Round-trip helicopter transfer from Vilanculos Airport
50% off the second guest's rate for couples

safaris.name: 8-Day Exclusive Northern Tanzania Migration Safari
safaris.summary: This private safari includes 8 days of adventure with a private guide and vehicle, providing you with a personalized and immersive experience throughout Tanzania’s most iconic parks.
highlights: 1 night at Arusha Coffee Lodge, then Lemala Mpingo Ridge in Tarangire
Ngorongoro stay at Melia with a Lake Manyara game drive
2 nights at Siringit Serengeti Camp exploring the Central Serengeti
2 nights at Siringit Migration Camp tracking the wildebeest migration
Private vehicle and guide throughout all parks
Regional flight from Kogatende back to Kilimanjaro Airport

safaris.name: 8-Day Fly-In Ultra-Lux Botswana Safari
safaris.summary: It combines luxury with the Kalahari’s rich cultural and natural heritage of the stunning Makgadikgadi Pans at Jack's Camp. Fly to Kings Pool Camp in the lush Linyanti Wildlife Reserve, and end the journey in ultimate luxury at Sanctuary Chief's Camp.
highlights: 2 nights at Jack's Camp, 2 at King's Pool, 3 at Sanctuary Chief's Camp
Quad biking or Bushman walk across the Makgadikgadi Pans
Eye-level elephant viewing from King's Pool underground hide
Mokoro safari through the lily-laden channels of the Okavango Delta
Game drives for lion, leopard and wild dog in the Linyanti and Delta
All inter-camp light-aircraft flights and transfers included

safaris.name: 8-Day Lower Zambezi Luxury Safari
safaris.summary: This exciting safari experience takes you deep into Zambia’s Lower Zambezi National Park, managed by the Zambia Wildlife Authority and supported by Conservation Lower Zambezi. You will explore two exclusive camps, enjoy a variety of professionally guided safari activities, and experience the stunning wildlife and landscapes of this renowned park. The itinerary includes return flights from Lusaka to Jeki, transfers between camps via game drives and scenic boat rides, and a fully inclusive package.
highlights: 3 nights at Chiawa Camp, then 4 at Old Mondoro in Lower Zambezi National Park
Twice-daily game drives tracking lions, leopards, elephants and buffalo
Canoe safari paddling silently alongside hippos and crocodiles on the Zambezi
Guided walking safari and night drives for nocturnal wildlife
Scenic boat transfer between camps along the Zambezi River
Return flights from Lusaka to Jeki Airstrip included

safaris.name: 8-Day Luxury Durban to Mozambique Serenity Safari
safaris.summary: Experience the ultimate luxury safari combining the rugged beauty of Thanda Safari Lodge in Durban with the serene beaches of White Pearls Resort in Mozambique.
highlights: 3 nights at Thanda Safari Lodge in KwaZulu-Natal, then 4 at White Pearl Resort in Mozambique
Twice-daily game drives with professional guide and tracker for Big Five sightings
Guided bush walks and Zulu storytelling evenings at the lodge
Snorkelling, kayaking, paddleboarding and fat-bike rides on the Mozambican coast
All meals, selected drinks and beach picnic included at White Pearl
Road transfers from Durban through to Maputo Airport included

safaris.name: 8-Day Ultra-Lux Fly-In Madikwe to Chobe Safari
safaris.summary: Experience the ultimate luxury safari, starting at Jamala Madikwe Safari Lodge in the Madikwe Game Reserve, where colonial elegance meets African wilderness. Enjoy thrilling game drives, personalized service, and world-class comfort while exploring the Big Five. Then, float into pure indulgence at Savute Elephant Lodge, a Belmond Safari in Chobe National Park. Known for its large elephant herds and spectacular wildlife, this ultra-luxurious lodge offers gourmet dining, serene spa treatments, and unforgettable safari adventures in the heart of the Savute region.
highlights: 3 nights at Jamala Madikwe Royal Safari Lodge in Madikwe Game Reserve
Big Five game drives across Madikwe with optional guided walking safari
4 nights at Belmond Savute Elephant Lodge in Chobe National Park
Twice-daily drives through the Savute region's vast elephant herds
Private dining under the stars and spa treatments between drives
All transfers, internal flights and Botswana park fees included

safaris.name: 8-Day Ultra-Lux Mauritius Island Holiday
highlights: 7 nights at The Oberoi Beach Resort in a Luxury Pavilion
All meals and local beverages included throughout the stay
Snorkelling, glass-bottom boat rides and kayaking in the lagoon
Windsurfing, wakeboarding, paddleboarding and Hobie Cat sailing
Spa treatments inspired by the island's natural surrounds
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and private airport transfers

safaris.name: 9-Day Exquisite Tanzania Wilderness Safari
safaris.summary: Embark on a luxurious safari through Tanzania, discovering the breathtaking beauty of the "Garden of Eden," the vast wilderness, and Tanzania's stunning landscapes.
highlights: 1 night at Arusha Coffee Lodge with a guided coffee plantation walk
1 night at Melia Ngorongoro Lodge overlooking the crater
2 nights at Siringit Serengeti Camp with daily game drives and a bush picnic
2 nights at Siringit Migration Camp tracking the Great Migration herds
2 nights at Lemala Mpingo Ridge in Tarangire, home to large elephant herds
All meals, local beverages, transfers and conservation fees included

safaris.name: 9-Day Kenya & Rwanda Safari: Big Five, Maasai Mara & Gorilla Trekking Tour
safaris.summary: Embark on a thrilling 9-day Kenya and Rwanda safari combining Big Five game viewing with unforgettable gorilla trekking. Explore Kenya’s iconic Maasai Mara, Lake Naivasha, and Amboseli National Park, home to elephants and views of Mount Kilimanjaro. Fly to Rwanda for a cultural tour of Kigali and a once-in-a-lifetime gorilla trekking adventure in Volcanoes National Park. Track golden monkeys and visit the Red Rocks community project. This diverse East African safari offers wildlife, culture, and landscapes—perfect for nature lovers and adventure seekers.
highlights: 2 nights at Mara Sopa Lodge with game drives in the Maasai Mara
Boat safari on Lake Naivasha and walking tour on Crescent Island
2 nights at Amboseli Sopa Lodge with elephants and Kilimanjaro views
Kigali city tour including the Genocide Memorial
Gorilla trekking in Volcanoes National Park from Ingagi Park View
Golden monkey tracking in the Virunga Mountains on the final day

safaris.name: 9-Day Luxury Botswana Wetlands to Wilderness Safari
safaris.summary: Experience the wilderness of the Okavango Delta in the ultimate luxury filled with water-based activities on the lagoons and channels.
highlights: 5 nights at Mopiri Camp in the Okavango Delta, then 3 at Mankwe Tented Retreat
Water-based safari by boat and mokoro through papyrus-lined channels
Spot hippos, crocodiles, sitatunga and the rare Pel's fishing owl
Twice-daily game drives in Moremi tracking lion, leopard and buffalo
Sundowner cruise on the lagoon and bush dinners under the stars
Light-aircraft flights from Maun via Mopiri to Khwai included

safaris.name: 9-Day Wild Encounters: Kenya’s Big Five & Uganda’s Gentle Giants
safaris.summary: This 9-day adventure combines the best of Kenya’s legendary wildlife and landscapes with Rwanda’s lush forests and gorilla trekking experiences. From the iconic plains of the Maasai Mara to the waters of Lake Naivasha, the elephant-studded vistas of Amboseli, and the misty mountains of Volcanoes National Park, this journey is designed for wildlife lovers, nature enthusiasts, and cultural explorers.
highlights: 2 nights at Mara Sopa Lodge with game drives across the Maasai Mara
Boat ride on Lake Naivasha and walking safari on Crescent Island
2 nights at Amboseli Sopa Lodge with elephant herds beneath Mt. Kilimanjaro
2 nights at 5-star Gorilla Leisure Lodge near Bwindi Impenetrable Forest
One hour trekking with endangered mountain gorillas in Bwindi
Internal flights from Nairobi to Entebbe and on to Kisoro included
